title: Staff Accountant
description: Citigroup is seeking a Staff Accountant to manage financial transactions and maintain accurate accounting records. You'll record entries, reconcile accounts, and prepare financial reports. Work hybrid in Kansas City for a global financial services company.
responsibilities: Record transactions and maintain general ledger accounts
Reconcile bank accounts and resolve discrepancies
Prepare financial statements and supporting schedules
Assist with audit and compliance activities
Monitor account balances and investigate variances

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
